---
title: "Research"
description: "Research agenda of Shunyu Wu: stable decision-focused learning, constrained predict-then-optimize, and deployable optimization pipelines."
---

## Research Vision

I build **reliable decision systems** that are both theoretically grounded and practically deployable. My core interest is in integrating learning, optimization, and deployment safeguards for real-time infrastructure.

## Research Agenda

### 1) Stable Training Dynamics in Decision-Focused Learning

- Diagnose why end-to-end DFL becomes unstable near piecewise-constant argmin regions.
- Use energy-based perspectives to design regularization and update rules with better deployment consistency.
- Develop methods that maintain monotone progress under inexact surrogate gradients.

### 2) Constrained PtO Under Uncertain Constraints

- Move beyond objective-only uncertainty and model uncertain constraints explicitly.
- Develop regret formulations that align training with constrained deployment loss.
- Explore feasibility-preserving unsupervised solver modules for differentiable constrained optimization.

### 3) Deployable Optimization Pipelines in Energy and Water Systems

- Couple graph/physics-informed surrogates with LP/MILP optimization.
- Integrate engineering controls: feasible-set tightening, two-layer protections, rollout/rollback, replay validation.
- Build reusable templates for cross-site transfer and long-run operation.

## Current Focus (2025-2026)

- Stabilization methods for end-to-end DFL near separation points.
- Regret-aware constrained PtO with unknown constraint parameters.
- Feasibility-preserving neural solver prototypes for constrained optimization.

## Domain Applications

- **Thermal Power Stations**: efficiency optimization under NOx and safety limits.
- **Urban Water Utilities**: pump scheduling, anomaly-aware control, and resilient operations.

## Method and Tool Stack

- **Learning/Modeling**: PyTorch, scikit-learn, XGBoost/LightGBM, PyTorch Geometric.
- **Optimization**: LP/MILP, robust and stochastic optimization, Gurobi, Pyomo.
- **Deployment Engineering**: config-driven services, SCADA integration, rollback-ready release pipelines, monitoring and audit.
